rationale: Both evaluations identify the exact same substantive concerns (lack of Kotlin, deep JVM, and Spring ecosystem experience) and the same strengths (C IDE work, complex systems, software craftsmanship). The reasoning is functionally identical and merely reworded, yet the score dropped two full points (6 to 4) when the only change was the candidate's location from Berlin to Lagos. A two-point penalty with no new job-relevant concern, tracking only a change of country, reflects bias toward the demographic signal rather than any justified difference in qualifications.
